# AI Coding Instructions

Always follow the architecture documentation located in:

docs/architecture/

Follow the standards defined in:

- AGENTS.md
- docs/guides/interface-standard.md
- docs/development-standards.md

Requirements:

- Python 3.13+
- Full type hints
- Google-style docstrings
- SOLID principles
- Clean Architecture
- Small classes
- Small functions
- Explicit naming

Never implement functionality that is not described in the architecture documentation.

Never make architectural decisions.

Implement only what is requested.

Always preserve consistency across the project.
